target_skill.name: ship-it
target_skill.description: Set up deployment — "ship it", "deploy this", "host this", "App Store", "Claude Code handoff". Not for fixes to live sites (→ git-ops), prototyping (→ build), or planning (→ architect).

competing_skills.name: git-ops
competing_skills.description: GitHub interface — "push this", "commit this", "create a repo", "push fix to live site", "what's in fairbay/X". Not for new-host setup (→ ship-it) or prototyping (→ build).

competing_skills.name: build
competing_skills.description: Write working code — "build this", "prototype this", "MVP this", "make it real". Not for planning (→ architect), bugs (→ systematic-debug), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: architect
competing_skills.description: Plan before coding — "architect this", "tech spec", "PRD", "how would I build this". Produces SPEC.md/PLAN.md. Not for raw ideas (→ idea-scout), code (→ build), or deploy (→ ship-it).

competing_skills.name: session-start
competing_skills.description: Session onboarding on first message — "work on [project]", "continue [project]". Loads handoff + PLAN. Not "where are we" (→ chat-status) or archiving (→ chat-archive).

positive_cases: Ship this to Vercel — first deploy for the photo-diff repo
Host the listing-lens app, fresh Vercel project setup
App Store submission for grove-mobile — walk me through it
Set up the Claude Code handoff for fairbay/photo-diff
negative_cases: Push the typo fix to fairbay/listing-lens live site (expect git-ops)
Build me a tip-splitting React artifact with touch buttons (expect build)
Architect the auth rewrite — write the SPEC.md before I code (expect architect)
Commit this and push to main (expect git-ops)
Let's continue work on Listing Lens v7 today (expect session-start)
